steps.title: Recognize the y-intercept
steps.content: The point $(0, 8)$ lies on the line. Since $x = 0$ at this point, $y = 8$ is the $y$-intercept.

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content: With slope $m = 6$ and $y$-intercept $b = 8$, slope-intercept form gives: $$y = 6x + 8$$

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content: The equation with slope $6$ and $y$-intercept $8$ is $y=6x+8$. That matches Choice A — $y = 6x + 8$.
